top_signals.title: M&G Extends Relationship with SS&C to Support Platform Operations
top_signals.summary: SS&C Technologies Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: SSNC) today announced it has expanded its longstanding relationship with M&G, a leading savings and investment firm. SS&C will take on the operational management of the M&G Platform, strengthening service delivery and operational resilience.
